revision.comment: Replace per TfD outcome
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}hmbox | class = resolved | message =
{{#ifexist:Template:{{{1|{{{text}}}}}}|{{ {{{1|{{{text}}}}}} }}|{{{1|{{{text|{{#if:{{{demo|}}}|{{Qmark}} {{var|Any [[Template:Done/See also|inline resolution template]] here}}|{{Resolved mark|size=24px}}}}}}}}}}}}
| extra = {{{2|{{{reason|}}}}}} | imagesize = 0x0 }}{{Resbox|demo=y}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}hmbox | class = resolved | message =
